Class BobaCookie

java.lang.Object
Main.Cookies.Cookie
Main.Cookies.BobaCookie
public class BobaCookie extends Cookie
Concrete cookie class representing Boba Cookie. Boba Cookie periodically launches Pearl Beads forward as a skill. The pearl travels through the stage, breaking obstacles and granting additional score bonuses.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • BobaCookie

      public BobaCookie()
      Creates a Boba Cookie with predefined stats, profile image, and skill cooldown configuration.

  • Method Details

    • createCookie

      public Animate createCookie()
      Creates and returns the animation controller for the cookie.
      Overrides:
      createCookie in class Cookie
      Returns:
      Animate object used to control the cookie animation

    • update

      public void update(double deltaTime)
      Updates the cookie state every frame. This method updates cooldown timing and automatically activates the skill when the cooldown reaches its limit.
      Overrides:
      update in class Cookie
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - time passed since the last update

    • useSkill

      public void useSkill()
      Activates the Boba Cookie skill. The cookie becomes temporarily invincible and launches a Pearl projectile forward to break obstacles.
      Specified by:
      useSkill in class Cookie

    • getCooldownProgress

      public double getCooldownProgress()
      Returns the cooldown progress of the skill.
      Overrides:
      getCooldownProgress in class Cookie
      Returns:
      value between 0 and 1 representing cooldown progress
